quests.name: The Old Man's Diary (Warm Doublet)
quests.giver: The Old Man, via his diary in the Woodcutter's House near the Forest of Spirits
quests.oneLine: Read his diary, then cook the dish he forgot: Spicy Meat and Seafood Fry (Raw Meat + Spicy Pepper + Hyrule Bass), and he'll reward you.

quests.name: The Stolen Heirloom
quests.oneLine: Investigate the theft of the Sheikah heirloom from Impa's house, tail Dorian at night, and recover the orb — this reveals Lakna Rokee Shrine.

quests.name: Watch Out for the Flowers
quests.oneLine: Cross Magda's flower field to the shrine without stepping on a single bloom, or she turns hostile — this reveals Hila Rao Shrine.

quests.name: Find the Fairy Fountain
quests.reward: Reveals Cotera's location; Pikango then offers shrine location hints
quests.oneLine: Help the traveling painter find the nearby Great Fairy Fountain northeast of Kakariko to awaken Cotera; afterward he gives shrine-photo hints.

quests.name: By Firefly's Light
quests.oneLine: Catch and deliver 5 Sunset Fireflies to Lasli, who misses chasing them at night.

quests.name: Cucco Conundrum
quests.oneLine: Round up Cado's escaped Cuccos and return all 10 to the pen near the chief's house.

quests.name: The Statue's Bargain
quests.giver: Teebo (boy in Hateno Village; Horned Statue on the village outskirts)
quests.reward: Ability to swap hearts/stamina (net 20-rupee fee per swap)
quests.oneLine: Pray to the Horned Statue to sell back a Heart Container or Stamina Vessel for 100 rupees, then rebuy for 120 to re-spec hearts vs stamina.

quests.name: The Sheep Rustlers
quests.oneLine: Clear the Bokoblins menacing the herd, then drive the three loose sheep back into the pen at Hateno Pasture before time runs out.

quests.name: The Weapon Connoisseur
quests.reward: Rupees per weapon, plus a Diamond on completion
quests.oneLine: Long quest: show Nebb 8 specific named weapons (Soldier's Broadsword, Knight's gear, etc.) one at a time over many visits.

quests.name: A Gift for My Beloved
quests.giver: Manny (boy near the inn in Hateno Village)
quests.oneLine: Find out innkeeper Prima's favorite drink for the lovestruck Manny, then bring her the right gift to win her over.

quests.name: Slated for Upgrades
quests.oneLine: After the lab is powered (Locked Mementos), bring Purah ancient materials and she powers up your Sheikah Slate runes (sensor, camera, etc.).

quests.name: Robbie's Research
quests.giver: Purah (Hateno Ancient Tech Lab; sends you to Robbie at Akkala)
quests.reward: 3 Ancient Arrows and access to Akkala Tech Lab research
quests.oneLine: Purah sends you to find Robbie at the Akkala Ancient Tech Lab; show him your scars to prove who you are and unlock ancient-tech crafting.

quests.name: Frog Catching
quests.giver: Tumbo (Zora child near the inn and general store, Zora's Domain)
quests.oneLine: Bring Tumbo five Hot-Footed Frogs caught around the Domain's pools and waterfalls.

quests.name: Luminous Stone Gathering
quests.giver: Ledo (Zora at the entrance just past the bridge into Zora's Domain)
quests.reward: Diamonds (2 for the first 10 stones, then 1 per 10)
quests.oneLine: Mine Luminous Stones from nearby cliffs and hand them to Ledo in batches of ten.

quests.name: Lynel Safari
quests.giver: Laflat (by the bridge at the eastern end of Zora's Domain)
quests.oneLine: Sneak a photo of the Lynel roaming Ploymus Mountain with the camera rune and bring it back to Laflat.

quests.name: Diving is Beauty!
quests.giver: Gruve (Zora on an upper level by a waterfall in Zora's Domain)
quests.oneLine: Perform a beautiful dive off the high platform into the water below, then report to Gruve.

quests.name: Zora Stone Monuments
quests.giver: Jiahto (Zora historian on the floor below the throne room, Zora's Domain)
quests.oneLine: Read all ten Zora Stone Monuments scattered around Zora's Domain and Vah Ruta's region, then report back to Jiahto.

quests.name: The Horseback Hoodlums
quests.oneLine: Perosa asks you to drive off the Blue Bokoblins riding horses around the stable; defeat the five mounted Bokoblins on Fural Plain.

quests.name: The Serpent's Jaws
quests.giver: Kass (in the Pagos Woods near the Spring of Courage)
quests.reward: Access to Shae Katha Shrine (Thunderspear chest + Spirit Orb)
quests.oneLine: Solve Kass's verse: drop a Farosh's Scale into the Spring of Courage to open the door behind the Goddess Statue to Shae Katha.

quests.name: Guardian Slideshow
quests.reward: Access to Shoqa Tatone Shrine (Spirit Orb)
quests.oneLine: Photograph three Guardian types (Scout, Skywatcher, Stalker) for Loone; she gives you her orb 'Roscoe' to raise Shoqa Tatone Shrine.

quests.name: Thunder Magnet
quests.oneLine: Lightning keeps hitting the stable. Climb to the roof and use Magnesis to pull out the metal Woodcutter's Axe lodged in the wooden horse head.

quests.name: Take Back the Sea
quests.oneLine: Monsters have overrun Aris Beach east of the village. Clear out every enemy in the stronghold there, then report back to Sebasto.

quests.name: The Hero's Cache
quests.giver: Kass, on a stone pillar at Kitano Bay (east Faron coast)
quests.oneLine: Solve Kass's riddle '17 of 24': at 5 PM the pillar's shadow points to a chest in the water. Pull it up with Magnesis to claim the cache.

quests.name: The Royal White Stallion
quests.oneLine: Tame the pure-white royal horse roaming near Safula Hill and register it at the stable to claim the royal gear.

quests.name: My Hero
quests.giver: Aliza, standing under the trees across the road from Outskirt Stable
quests.oneLine: Show Aliza the Master Sword (you must already have pulled it) to prove you are the hero she's waiting for.

quests.name: A Rare Find
quests.oneLine: Trott is sick of vegetarian meals; bring him fresh Raw Gourmet Meat (from Hebra/Gerudo wildlife) for his reward.

quests.name: A Royal Recipe
quests.reward: Silver Rupee (300 rupees); a second cake earns another
quests.oneLine: Cook the royal kitchen's Fruitcake (or Monster Cake) and bring it to Gotter; the recipes are in Hyrule Castle's library.

quests.name: The Royal Guard's Gear
quests.oneLine: Parcy wants to see Royal Guard equipment; retrieve any Royal Guard armor piece from Hyrule Castle and show it to her.

quests.name: A Gift for the Great Fairy
quests.reward: Access to Great Fairy Kaysa's fountain (armor upgrades)
quests.oneLine: Toren hands you his 500-rupee life savings to wake the Great Fairy; carry it southwest to Kaysa's fountain on Piper Ridge and pay her to open it.

quests.name: Misko, the Great Bandit
quests.giver: Domidak and Prissen at Dueling Peaks Stable
quests.oneLine: Started at Dueling Peaks Stable, but the clue points to ruined pillars where Rayne, Piper, and Tanagar meet in Hyrule Ridge - dig there for the stash.

quests.name: A Gift for the Great Fairy
quests.reward: The revived Great Fairy Fountain (you keep the 500 Rupees if Kaysa is already free)
quests.oneLine: Toren gives you 500 Rupees to offer Great Fairy Kaysa; find her fountain on Piper Ridge south of Tabantha Tower and revive her.

quests.name: The Spark of Romance
quests.oneLine: Bring Jogo a piece of flint so he can light a fire and bake apples for his wife.

quests.name: The Apple of My Eye
quests.oneLine: Cook and deliver a Baked Apple to Juney so she can keep up her offering at the Goddess statue.

quests.name: Find Kheel
quests.reward: Rupees; also unlocks the Recital at Warbler's Nest shrine quest
quests.oneLine: Track down Amali's missing daughter Kheel; she has flown off to Warbler's Nest with her sisters.

quests.name: Face the Frost Talus
quests.oneLine: Defeat the Frost Talus out in the Hebra/Tabantha mountains, then report back to Gesane.

quests.name: Stalhorse: Pictured!
quests.oneLine: Photograph a Stalhorse - they appear at night in the North Tabantha Snowfield - then show Juannelle the picture.

quests.name: Snowball Bowling
quests.giver: Pondo (Pondo's Lodge, northeast of Hebra Tower)
quests.reward: Blizzard Rod for a first-throw strike (Gold Rupee on later strikes/full inventory)
quests.oneLine: Pay 20 rupees to roll a giant snowball down the slope at the totem 'pins'; a first-ball strike is the goal.

quests.name: The Korok Trials
quests.oneLine: Chio asks you to clear three forest shrine quests: Trial of Second Sight, The Lost Pilgrimage, and The Test of Wood.

quests.name: Riddles of Hyrule
quests.giver: Walton (asleep atop the Great Deku Tree, Korok Forest)
quests.oneLine: Solve Walton's five riddles by dropping the right item on the leaf before him: apple, fortified pumpkin, sunshroom, voltfin trout, Lynel hoof.

quests.name: Fireproof Lizard Roundup
quests.giver: Kima (Southern Mine, southwest of Goron City)
quests.reward: Flamebreaker Armor (the chest piece of the heat-resistant set)
quests.oneLine: Catch and deliver 10 Fireproof Lizards to Kima to help the injured miners; he takes them in batches.

quests.name: The Road to Respect
quests.reward: 100 Rupees (plus the gems the Igneo Talus drops)
quests.oneLine: Defeat the Igneo Talus at Darunia Lake that the blacksmith's apprentice Fugo couldn't beat, then report back to him.

quests.name: Death Mountain's Secret
quests.oneLine: Find Dugby's hidden weapon along the path to the Bridge of Eldin, behind a bombable cracked wall above the lava falls.

quests.name: The Jewel Trade
quests.oneLine: Bring the gem collector Ramella 10 pieces of Amber while she tours Goron City.

quests.name: From the Ground Up
quests.giver: Hudson (Bolson Construction; met during 'Hylian Homeowner' in Hateno, then sent to Akkala)
quests.reward: Builds Tarrey Town (general store, dye shop, ongoing supplies) and a wedding scene
quests.oneLine: Send Hudson to Akkala, then recruit residents whose names end in 'son' to build Tarrey Town from scratch around the lakeside.

quests.name: The Spring of Power
quests.oneLine: Take the legend to the Spring of Power and offer a Shard of Dinraal's Scale to the goddess statue to reveal Tutsuwa Nima Shrine.

quests.name: The Skull's Eye
quests.giver: Jerrin at the Akkala Ancient Tech Lab
quests.oneLine: Reach the Ancient Shrine atop the pillar in Skull Lake's left eye to reveal Zuna Kai Shrine.

quests.name: Into the Vortex
quests.giver: Stone tablet at the base of Rist Peninsula (auto-logged when read)
quests.oneLine: Carry the nearby Ancient Orb to the center of the Rist Peninsula spiral and place it to make Ritaag Zumo Shrine rise.

quests.name: Trial of the Labyrinth
quests.giver: Auto-logged on reaching Lomei Labyrinth Island
quests.reward: Reveals Tu Ka'loh Shrine; Barbarian Helm in the shrine chest
quests.oneLine: Navigate the Guardian-filled northeast maze and burn the Malice eye to reach Tu Ka'loh Shrine; a Barbarian Helm chest sits inside the shrine.

quests.name: The Search for Barta
quests.oneLine: Find the missing guard Barta, hiding near the Gerudo Great Skeleton, and report back to Liana.

quests.name: Tools of the Trade
quests.reward: Reopens the jewelry shop; counts toward the Thunder Helm
quests.oneLine: Bring Isha 10 Flint so she can get her jewelry stand running again.

quests.name: Medicinal Molduga
quests.reward: Gold Rupee; counts toward the Thunder Helm
quests.oneLine: Bring Malena Molduga Guts to treat her sick husband; fight the Molduga from a rock or ledge with bombs.

quests.name: The Mystery Polluter
quests.oneLine: Follow the trail of Hydromelon rinds to Calyban on the wall by the water, who is polluting Dalia's garden, and get her to stop.

quests.name: The Secret Club's Secret
quests.giver: Begins on trying to enter the Gerudo Secret Club (Greta's shop)
quests.reward: Access to the Gerudo Secret Club (sells Desert Voe and Radiant sets)
quests.oneLine: Eavesdrop at The Noble Canteen to learn the password 'GSC' (plus a diamond) and gain entry. Optional; not needed for the Thunder Helm.

quests.name: The Thunder Helm
quests.oneLine: Complete the four Gerudo Town favors (Barta, Tools of the Trade, Medicinal Molduga, Mystery Polluter), then Riju lends you the Thunder Helm.

quests.name: The Eighth Heroine
quests.giver: Bozai (outside Gerudo Town's gate, near Daqo Chisay Shrine)
quests.oneLine: Wearing the Gerudo outfit, photograph the Statue of the Eighth Heroine in the snowy Gerudo Highlands for Bozai. He lends Snow Boots to help.

quests.name: The Forgotten Sword
quests.giver: Bozai (Gerudo Town, follow-up after The Eighth Heroine)
quests.oneLine: After The Eighth Heroine, find the heroine's missing sword on the snowfield near her statue and report back to Bozai.
